results.text: Tynan Lawrence - Stats, Contract, Salary & More - Elite Prospects. Lawrence is a naturally explosive skater, chaining crossovers and maximizing his speed by receiving the puck deep in his own zone. A two-way centre, he wins end-wall battles with timing and speed, and forces turnovers with his non-stop pressure. 2026 NHL Draft Diary: Tynan Lawrence - NHL.com. Tynan Lawrence of Boston University in Hockey East will file a draft diary for NHL.com this season leading up to the 2026 NHL Draft, which will be held June 26 and 27 at KeyBank Center in Buffalo ...
